headline: Why The Story Around T. Rowe Price (TROW) Is Shifting As Analysts Reset Expectations
summary: The fair value estimate for T. Rowe Price Group was trimmed to US$100.58 from US$102.08, echoing a broader pattern of reduced price targets across the Street. Recent cuts ranging from about US$2 to US$12 signal that analysts are recalibrating expectations as they update models for early reads on February and Q1 traditional asset manager flows. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and keep track of the evolving narrative around the stock. Analyst Price Targets...

headline: Is It Time To Reconsider T. Rowe Price (TROW) After Years Of Mixed Share Returns?
summary: If you are wondering whether T. Rowe Price Group at around US$89.87 is offering fair value or a potential opportunity, the key is to understand what the current price actually reflects. The stock has returned 0.3% over the last 7 days, with a 5.3% decline over 30 days, a 14.1% decline year to date, a 0.9% return over 1 year, a 5.3% decline over 3 years, and a 36.2% decline over 5 years.
